Author: ctrl-alt-automate
Message:
security: Remove hardcoded tokens from ScenarioTestHelper

BREAKING CHANGE: Test credentials now loaded from environment variables

Required environment variables:
- NETBOX_449_HOST / NETBOX_449_TOKEN (plasma-paint)
- NETBOX_449_ZWQG_HOST / NETBOX_449_ZWQG_TOKEN (cloud.netboxapp.com)
- NETBOX_437_HOST / NETBOX_437_TOKEN (badger-victor)
- NETBOX_450_HOST / NETBOX_450_TOKEN (zulu-how)

Added validation with clear error messages when env vars are missing.

IMPORTANT: Revoke and regenerate all exposed tokens immediately!

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: ctrl-alt-automate
Message:
feat: Add 500 error fallback for bulk operations

When bulk API requests fail with 500 Internal Server Error (which can
occur due to Redis cache inconsistency on cloud-hosted Netbox instances),
the module now automatically falls back to sequential single-item requests.

Changes:
- Send-NBBulkRequest: Add 500 error detection and sequential fallback
  with exponential backoff retry (3 attempts, 500ms/1s/2s delays)
- Connect-NBAPI: Add AllowInsecureRedirect for PS 7.4+ compatibility
- Set-NBIPAMAddress: Add ValueFromPipelineByPropertyName to Status/Description
- Get-NBTenant: Rename GroupID to Group_Id with backwards-compatible alias
- Add Scenario test suite for bulk operations, workflows, filters

Fixes: Test file bug where $($i++) in string interpolation doesn't work
in PowerShell - increment must be on separate line before use.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: ctrl-alt-automate
Message:
ci: Add exe.dev live testing workflow and v2 token support

- Update version matrix: 4.3.7, 4.4.9, 4.5.0-beta1
- Add v2 token tests for Netbox 4.5+ in integration.yml
- Add 4.5.0-beta1 to compatibility.yml
- Create exe-dev-tests.yml for testing against live exe.dev VMs
  - Manual trigger with VM selection (all/stable/minimum/beta)
  - Quick and full test scopes
  - Requires EXEDEV_TOKEN_* secrets

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: NetBox v1 API token (40-char hex key)
Author: ctrl-alt-automate
Message:
Add development tooling and Claude Code integration

- Add CLAUDE.md with project overview and development guide
- Add Connect-DevNetbox.ps1 helper script for quick API connection
- Add .netboxps.config.example.ps1 template for local credentials
- Add specialized slash commands for AI-assisted development:
  - /netbox-api: Netbox API expert for endpoint documentation
  - /powershell-expert: PowerShell best practices guidance
  - /implement: Combined workflow for new endpoint implementation
  - /test-endpoint: Compatibility testing against Netbox 4.4.7
- Update .gitignore to exclude local config files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
